display.purpose: Section hero statements via .ui-display; cream ink only.

display-hero.purpose: Home dual-title decorative line; GSAP masked rise.

motion.name: ui-enter
motion.purpose: Legacy CSS enter; prefer GSAP for authored marketing.

motion.name: hero-display-intro
motion.value: GSAP char yPercent rise, power4-style ease

motion.name: scroll-reveal-icons
motion.purpose: Mission-adjacent masked icon rise; desktop only.

breakpoints.name: frame-edge
breakpoints.purpose: ui-frame lateral gutters and rule-frame below lg

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal gold conversion control; square shell.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: #c49314; color: #11110d; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d6a72b; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e0b43e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Utility
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border-left: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); background: transparent; color: #b0a78d; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #f2ede0; background: #222118; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e0b43e; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Metadata Kicker
components.css: .ds-kicker { margin: 0; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; line-height: 1.4; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b0a78d; }

components.name: Framed Panel
components.description: Structural cell on the soft-rule grid.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #11110d; color: #f2ede0; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); border-radius: 0; padding: 20px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-kicker { margin: 0 0 1rem; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b0a78d; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.065em; line-height: 0.92; }

components.name: Install Script Shell
components.description: Hero command box only; eyebrow + select sit outside.
components.html: $bun create kubojs@latest
components.css: .ds-install { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); border-radius: 12px; background: #181814; color: #f2ede0; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-install-prompt { color: #c49314; } .ds-install-cmd { flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-install-copy { height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); border-radius: 8px; background: #11110d; color: #b0a78d; font: inherit; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-size: 0.6875rem; cursor: pointer; } .ds-install-copy:hover { color: #f2ede0; background: #222118; } .ds-install-copy:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e0b43e; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Site Header Bar
components.html:
K
ProductSystem
GitHubBuild a stack
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: stretch; height: 48px; max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); background: color-mix(in srgb, #11110d 95%, transparent); color: #b0a78d; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-header-mark { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); color: #c49314; font-weight: 700; } .ds-header-nav { display: flex; } .ds-header-nav a { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 20px; border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header-nav a:hover { color: #f2ede0; background: #222118; } .ds-header-util { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-left: auto; padding: 0 16px; border-left: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, #11110d); color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; background: #c49314; color: #11110d; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; }

narrative.overview:
Better T Stack (product face: Kubo) should feel like a well-made infrastructure manual brought to life: exact, independent, and kinetic. A visible soft-rule grid, explicit states, and compact technical metadata make architecture choices feel inspectable. The shell is dark-first because it lives beside editors and terminals, not because developer tools must look neon or theatrical.

The design is architectural, not card-driven. Sections, navigation, controls, diagrams, and footers meet at shared 1 px soft rules. Product behavior carries the visual story through stack diagrams, create commands, compatibility states, and real usage data. Gold is a signal, not wallpaper: primary conversion surfaces, selected states, and structural emphasis only. Display titles stay cream ink; accent color is not used to colorize every second line of a headline.

It explicitly rejects Mistral's identity and assets, generic purple gradients, glowing glass cards, decorative terminal chrome, excessive shadows, rounded-card grids as default layout, and a split light/dark dual identity.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, warm-olive canvas (#11110d) with cream ink (#f2ede0)
Soft structural rules (white mixed 6% into canvas), not loud brown rails
Contiguous grid cells; gutters reserved for content rhythm, not card decoration
Archivo display + IBM Plex Mono kickers/commands
Signal gold (#c49314) for primary actions and chart emphasis; cream titles
Flat elevation: no decorative shadows on the marketing shell
Mobile recomposes reading order; fixed header is 48 px (3rem)
Authored marketing motion uses GSAP; UI state uses short 150 ms color transitions

rules.name: The Soft-Rule Rule
rules.body: Structural borders default to the soft white mix, not a high-contrast brown rail. Soft rules define bands; they never replace text contrast or focus rings.

rules.name: The Gold Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Gold is for actions, selected state, and intentional markers. Display headlines stay Cream Ink. Do not paint every alternating title line gold by default.

rules.name: The One Statement Rule
rules.body: Display type carries a single declarative message. Feature detail moves into body copy and metadata instead of competing at the same scale.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: If hierarchy is weak, change tone, rule, or position. Do not add a drop shadow to compensate.

dos: Do use the Soft Rule (--rule / border-rule) to join sections, controls, diagrams, and footer groups into one frame.
Do keep display titles in Cream Ink; reserve Signal Gold for actions and intentional markers.
Do use semantic tokens from apps/web/src/app/global.css instead of raw Tailwind palette colors.
Do keep primary narrow-layout targets at least 44 px high.
Do recompose mobile reading order; do not merely shrink the desktop grid.
Do preserve visible focus, semantic headings, reduced-motion behavior, and keyboard access.
Do use commands, configuration, diagrams, and real output to explain the product.
Do keep header height and hero 100svh offset in sync (3rem).
donts: Don't copy Mistral's identity, logo, navigation, copy, color arrangement, pixel artwork, or proprietary imagery.
Don't use generic purple gradients, glowing glass cards, decorative terminal chrome, excessive shadows, or rounded-card grids as shorthand for developer tooling.
Don't split the product into unrelated light and dark visual systems or treat violet explorer palettes as the marketing primary.
Don't hide essential navigation or product information behind hover-only interaction.
Don't use gradient text or colored side-stripe borders greater than 1 px.
Don't wrap every section in an isolated floating card when a shared rule and clear spatial rhythm communicate hierarchy.
Don't reintroduce high-contrast brown rails for routine seams (soft-rule is the default).
Don't animate layout properties; prefer transform/opacity and GSAP for authored marketing motion.
